literal: to tremble or shake with fear

relabelled_senses.definition: A dummy artillery piece, usually made from wood or other materials and painted to resemble a real cannon, used historically as a ruse de guerre to mislead an enemy about defensive strength.

literal: no literal meaning
a principle or preference that values higher standard, excellence, or durability in fewer items or occurrences rather than a larger number of lesser standard ones
a powerful female animal, especially a lioness
to attack, assault, harass, or verbally abuse a person because they are or are perceived to be queer
an odd, eccentric, or unconventional person
to spoil, thwart, or upset someone's plans, arrangements, or chances
a situation of trouble or difficulty
literally 'what a surprise'; an expression of genuine astonishment or unexpectedness
a disparaging term for a man perceived as effete, timid, or lacking traditional masculine qualities
done rapidly with minimal effort, refinement, or regard for thoroughness
extremely quickly; in a very short time or almost instantaneously
extremely fast in movement or action; very swift
a small amount of money obtained quickly and with little effort
performed rapidly in succession; delivered or occurring in quick succession
prompt to act or respond; quick to take advantage of an opportunity
able to think and respond rapidly; mentally agile and adaptable
able to draw a weapon, especially a firearm, very rapidly; prepared to take immediate physical action
able to understand or learn things rapidly; quick to grasp ideas, instructions, or implications
a short or fast-to-read text such as a book or article that can be finished in a brief period because it is concise or easy to follow
